title: haumaniastrum galeopsifolium
intro: Haumaniastrum galeopsifolium, also known as the Chinese teasel or galeopsis leaf Haumaniastrum, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Haumaniastrum galeopsifolium is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its dried leaves can be made into tea, capsules, or tablets for consumption.
